name: NEO Optional Tooling Skills
description: Optional helper tools that NEO can recommend with operator consent. They are not required for NeoOptimize to run.

skills.name: Microsoft PowerToys
use_cases: advanced support utilities when user explicitly wants them
policy: explain why it is useful before installation
verify winget source and publisher before execution

skills.name: Winbindex Windows Binary Index
policy: do not replace local file integrity checks
do not download or replace system files automatically
